item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 5min Me: "Hi, I'd like to book a tee time for tomorrow at 8:00 AM."
The groundskeeper minutes a
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 5min Me: "Hi, I'd like to book a tee time for tomorrow at 8:00 AM."
The groundskeeper minutes after I booked the tee time: 0:32 2 3 25 4 mil

item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 35min I somehow got Joseph to take the other side of a "Cam Young is incredible" take here.
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 35min I somehow got Joseph to take the other side of a "Cam Young is incredible" take here. I trust him to win a major even more now than I did before the Masters.
Pod brought to you by @TurtleboxAudio and @hbgolfusa . 2 1 26 10 mil

item.title: JosephLaMagna: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 23min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS hi kyle, delete this, please 16 784
item.description: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 23min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS hi kyle, delete this, please 16 784

item.title: AlanShipnuck: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 24min Jeff Pearlman and I came up together at SI. We have now typed a combined 21 books. T
item.description: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 24min Jeff Pearlman and I came up together at SI. We have now typed a combined 21 books. This is an incredibly fun conversation about the changing media landscape, athlete ego, the old days at SI, media ethics, how to promote a book and, oh yeah, RORY: podcasts.apple.com Alan Shipnuck: Author, "Rory: The Heartache and Triumph of Golf's Most Human Superstar" Podcast Episode · Two Writers Slinging Yang · April 14 · 1h 3 16 3 mil

item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 31min We're giving away a $250 gift card from @ShipSticks on the newsletter today. All you
item.description: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 31min We're giving away a $250 gift card from @ShipSticks on the newsletter today. All you have to do is comment below with your favorite moment from the 2026 Masters (the more ridiculous, the better) and be subscribed to our free newsletter, which will go out later today. 29 2 15 7 mil

item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 26min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS Here's the link to sign up for our newsletter. De normal
item.description: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 26min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS Here's the link to sign up for our newsletter. De normalsport.com 3 mil
